title: Ma's Chicken Pie
excerpt: Ingredients 250 ml chicken stock (just use a stock cube) 125 ml white wine 2 large onions, 1 cut into quarters and the other one chopped into cubes juice of 1 lemon 4 peppercorns 4 cloves 1.2 kg chicken pieces a little olive oil 250 g small bacon cubes 1 tub smooth cream cheese 1 tin creamed …
html:
Ingredients

  • 250 ml chicken stock (just use a stock cube)
  • 125 ml white wine
  • 2 large onions, 1 cut into quarters and the other one chopped into cubes
  • juice of 1 lemon
  • 4 peppercorns
  • 4 cloves
  • 1.2 kg chicken pieces
  • a little olive oil
  • 250 g small bacon cubes
  • 1 tub smooth cream cheese
  • 1 tin creamed mushrooms
  • 1 packet mushroom soup powder
  • 1 roll puff pastry
  • 1 egg, beaten with 15 ml water

Method

Put the stock, wine, onion quarters, lemon juice, peppercorns, cloves and chicken pieces in a saucepan and bring to the boil. Lower the heat and let it simmer until the chicken is tender.

Take the chicken out (keep the stock) and set aside to cool.

Then remove the skin and bones and flake the chicken into smaller pieces.

Meanwhile heat a little oil in a pan and fry the onion cubes together with the bacon until golden brown and spoon into a mixing bowl. Mix in the cream cheese and the tin of creamed mushrooms.

Mix the soup powder with a little of the stock and stir into the cream cheese mixture. (See Tip for the leftover stock).

Mix the chicken pieces in lightly, spoon everything into an oven dish and lay the pastry over it. Press the edges of the pastry firmly onto the rim of the dish with a fork.

Cut a small cross in the middle of the pastry so steam can escape – or use a classic pie steam-vent chicken. Use any leftover pastry as decoration if you feel like it.

Brush the pastry lightly with the beaten egg and bake the pie at 200°C until the pastry is golden brown and done.

Serves 6 with baked potatoes and pumpkin slices.

Easy!

Tip: Blend the delicious stock with a stick blender until smooth and season to taste. Serve with the pie or any other chicken dish.
